title: Create: Unclamped
description: Removes the various clamps on speed!
body:
**Create: Unclamped** removes some built-in clamps on speed-based content in Create!

### Features
- Removed Speed Clamp on the Mechanical Arm
- Removes Speed Clamp on the Creative Motor
- Removes Speed Clamp on the Kinetic Scroll Value Behaviour

These combined features let you abuse the full `maxRotationSpeed` config option on Creative Motors and Mechanical Arms!
